channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Big Tech turns to nuclear energy to power AI boom
item.description: Major technology companies are increasingly turning to nuclear energy as they attempt to keep up with the vast energy demands of artificial intelligence (AI) without derailing their highly publicized environmental goals.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: How Libya and Tuvalu are cashing in on their top-level domain names
item.description: Anguilla is raking in extra revenue from registration fees for its .ai web domain thanks to the artificial intelligence boom, but it’s not the only place cashing in on demand for websites with distinctive address endings.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Neural Processing Units (NPUs): The dawn of AI PCs
item.description: In May, Microsoft unveiled a new category of PCs: Copilot+ PCs, the first of a new generation of AI laptops, desktops, and tablets that enable AI processing to happen at the edge.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Meta can’t escape states’ claims it hooked kids on platforms
item.description: The attorneys general have alleged that despite research showing Facebook and Instagram use is associated with depression and other mental health issues, Meta won’t remove the platforms’ harmful features.
item.dc:creator: Tribune News Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Army modernization from the technology point of view
item.description: "We're working with our development teams and we're working with testing. And then we have a policy that covers all of that," said Young Bang. The post Army modernization from the technology point of view first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Derace Lauderdale, Federal News Network

item.title: US agency adopts rule to make it easier for consumers to cancel unwanted subscriptions
item.description: The Federal Trade Commission adopted a final rule Wednesday that will require businesses to make it easy for consumers to cancel unwanted subscriptions and memberships.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: FTC announces rule to make it easier to cancel subscriptions
item.description: The Federal Trade Commission is taking steps to make it easier for consumers to cancel digital subscriptions.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, The Hill

item.title: Lyft launches voter transportation initiative
item.description: Ride-hailing service Lyft announced it will offer discounted rides, bikeshare and scooters on Election Day, an initiative designed to increase transportation access for voters, according to a press release.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, The Hill

item.title: Spotify is adding new markets to its music video test
item.description: Spotify is expanding its beta test of adding music videos to the platform by several dozen regions, though it still is unavailable in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Mexico says foreign firms have pledged $20 billion in investments, but many are old or uncertain
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Mexican officials announced Tuesday what they claimed was $20 billion in new foreign direct investment in Mexico, but much of that was neither new, nor completely certain.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The Future of Computing: Semiconductor Giants Join Forces for AI-Powered x86 Processors
item.description: Semiconductor rivals Intel and AMD form an x86-processor advisory group to address increasing AI workloads, custom chiplets, and advances in 3D packaging and system architectures.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The WordPress drama could have major implications for the internet
item.description: The WordPress situation has soured in the past several weeks, as a dispute spirals out of control between founder Matt Mullenweg and WP Engine, a platform that many users deploy in order to host their WordPress sites.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: How Ernst & Young’s AI platform is ‘radically’ reshaping operations
item.description: Multinational consultancy Ernst & Young (EY) said generative AI (genAI) is “radically reshaping” the way it operates, and the company boasts a 96% adoption rate of the technology by employees. After spending $1.4 billion on a customized generative AI platform called EY.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Adobe makes GenStudio app generally available
item.description: Adobe’s GenStudio content supply chain platform is now generally available, with the ability to publish content directly to social media channels such as Instagram, Snap and TikTok coming soon.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: SpaceX catches Starship rocket booster on Texas launchpad
item.description: SpaceX caught a rocket booster on its Texas launchpad as it returned to Earth on Sunday. The chopstick-like arms of the tower, called Mechazilla, grabbed the descending 232-foot booster after a seven-minute flight.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: Volunteers bring solar power to Hurricane Helene's disaster zone
item.description: BAKERSVILLE, N.C. (AP) — Nearly two weeks after Hurricane Helene downed power lines and washed out roads all over North Carolina's mountains, the constant din of a gas-powered generator is getting to be too much for Bobby Renfro.
item.dc:creator: GABRIELA AOUN ANGUEIRA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Over 77,000 customers' personal information is exposed in Fidelity Investments data breach
item.description: Fidelity Investments, one of the world's biggest asset managers, experienced a data breach in August, the company's second in 12 months.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: MoneyGram hack exposes customers' sensitive data, cripples services
item.description: MoneyGram, an American payment and money transfer platform, confirmed a data breach that exposed sensitive customer data to hackers, forcing its services offline for five days.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Elon Musk unveils Tesla's 'Cybercab' as stock sinks
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Tesla unveiled its long-awaited robotaxi at a Hollywood studio Thursday night, though fans of the electric vehicle maker will have to wait until at least 2026 before they are available. CEO Elon Musk pulled up to a stage at the Warner Bros.
item.dc:creator: TOM KRISHER and ALEX VEIGA, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Biometric data: Is it safe to hand it over to any company that asks?
item.description: Biometric data, like face and fingerprint scans, can help you save time when accessing your personal data – but with it comes a whole host of privacy risks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
